entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: Have you checked the value after import? How is your measure amount define?

entry.title: Re: VB6 application with Crystal report
entry.content:
Hi,

Just to say that it is possible to run a VB6 application with Crystal Reports on Windows 10 and 11.  It is not advisable due to VB6 being long out of support, but it is possible.  I might be able to give some advice on this error if you let us know the version of Crystal Reports that you're using and the type of database connection that your reports use.

entry.title: Re: Joule with SFSF – Common Setup Issues
entry.content: Hi @Shreya4 can you please reach us with your Ticket number? you can DM me the number

entry.title: Re: Smarttable fields are changeable although they have b...
entry.content:
@Marian_Zeis  

I would expect that only the fields that are allowed by the RAP framework (metadata from the entity set) are editable. Currently you can edit all fields as soon as the table is set to editable even key fields which should not be editable.(Screenshot 2) If I use the same EntitySet with a SmartField and SmartForms, it will automatically decide whether it is editable or not (Screenshot 1). I would expect the same behavior on column level of the smarttable. You can see this behavior in the two screenshots here. Both Controls have the same EntitySet

entry.title: Upgrade impact to roles 2502
entry.content:
Our test system is upgraded to DIGITS and the production system will be upgraded this weekend.
here we are facing some challenges to identify role changes to adjust.
Kindly share some guides on this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade impact to roles 2502
entry.content:
Dear Chirag Prajapati,

Please kindly check the following KBA for the 2502 Upgrade about Identity and Access Management :

3533745 - Identity and Access Management (IAM): Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 - SAP for Me

You can try to use the app "Manage Business Role Changes After Upgrade" to adjust the roles you are using:

Manage Business Role Changes After Upgrade | SAP Help Portal

Best Practices for Managing Business Role Changes After an Upgrade | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

Bell

entry.title: Re: Your Guide to Free Learning Journeys on SAP Finance
entry.content:
Live Sessions complement the learning journey offering. These Finance live sessions are scheduled for this month.

Feb 2025

Master Data and End-of-Day Processes in In-House Banking 2025/02/04 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gn44Swpz
Asset Accounting Integration Aspects 2025/02/06 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gMUASVH9
Scalability of BRIM Solutions - Performance Indicators and Potential 2025/02/10 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gm3mby_D
Flexible Workflow for Payment Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for advanced payment management 2025/02/11 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gaXk-thC
Managing the SAP Cash Application for FI-CA 2025/02/12 10:00 https://lnkd.in/ghJahcct
Posting Control, Allocations, and Settlement in SAP S/4HANA 2025/02/12 14:00 https://lnkd.in/g3ZwYr2i
Taulia Working Capital Management Solutions for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2025/02/13 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gvYNMYdJ
Currency translation in group reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2025/02/19 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gm7hh5r4
Currency translation in group reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2025/02/19 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gm7hh5r4
BRIM Localization with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) 2025/02/24 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gQiDVUGm

entry.title: Re: Could not convert from '' to 'USD' on '01.01.2025'. P...
entry.content: Do you have any currency bearing dimension member not having currency property maintained?

entry.title: Re: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content: Ok, than put a script based onResultChange of the table wich is linked to the story filter. But to get the selected members , use getdimensionfilter on the inputcontrol not on the story filter.

entry.title: SAP Build & Integration Suite CodeJams in Dubai in March 2025
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Dubai,

For the first time in Dubai, SAP is conducting two CodeJams on Integration Suite and SAP Build topics. These events are hosted by Mark9 Solutions and Robert Bosch respectively. These are free, full day, hands on events on BTP topics for enabling users on the tools and technologies related to Integration Suite and SAP Build. More details on these events and how to register are provided in the links below.

March 25, 2025

🇦🇪SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite 

March 26, 2025

🇦🇪SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code

CC: @ajmaradiaga 

Join, Learn, Collaborate and Network!

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content: Completed 😀

entry.title: How to change a numeric value to a percentage value in a numeric point chart in SAC?
entry.content:
I have a numeric point chart which shows some value & this value is coming from a filter / input_control in SAC.

I want to use a button to switch between a numeric value & a percentage value in the chart. Is this possible to achieve? Kindly share solutions, if possible!

entry.title: Re: How to Track Approval Details of Maintenance Requests
entry.content:
Hello,

For approval details you may check individual notification change documents.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: Well the COGS is the below screenshot is 3104 million which is what you said you expected. Also to see data in USD if you have to create a measure for conversion in the story to show the converted amount.

entry.title: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277
entry.content: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277

entry.title: Re: Can anyone explain how to maintain flexible replenish...
entry.content:
Hi papa261190,

With the upcoming OP2025 S/4 Hana release this feature becomes fully available. Please have a look at my KBA 3502154 How to maintain checking horizon via BPS - for detailed information.

Right now, it is not possible to setup the horizon in another way - than the old way via total replenishment lead time/planned delivery time and/or goods receipt processing time. Sorry, you have to wait for the next release (OP2025).

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: What is the last column. Do you have a currency dimension separately. I hope you have not loaded the last column which shows currency

entry.title: External number range for Billing Documents (VF01) possibility in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we have a requirement to map external number range to billing types in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud edition.

We had assigned external number range and ticked external and this is reflected in NRIV table as well for RV_BELEG  number range object.

However while creating billing document, there is no option to key in manual external number range as per the assignment. Please do let us know any possibility to achieve this SAP S/HANA both in Standard and through enhancement route. 

Also, please advise whether external billing number range is possible if we implement BADI as below.

Could you please advise on the possibility to have external number range for billing documents both in SAP Standard or in enhancement route using BADI without having any prefix in number range. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: @N1kh1l I have added currency column just to show the unit of amount but in actual I haven't uploaded the currency column when importing data. Currency is only maintained in organization dimension

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: @William_Yu yes it's the same incorrect value appearing in USD

entry.title: Error in ME21N 'Data from Business Add-In ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST not adopted'
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST with method PROCESS_ITEM to update UMSON & KNTTP fields and method PROCESS_ACCOUNT to update SAKTO & KOSTL fields during PO creation. 

The system throws an error 'Data from Business Add-In ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST not adopted' in ME21N because of this badi implementation.

I also noticed that the error only occurs if PROCESS_ACCOUNT method is implemented and if I remove this method implementation then I dont get the error.

I already checked SAP notes and community blogs related to this topic but I dont see a solution.

It would be great if someone could post solution to this.

Below is the code snippet for both snippets.

     

Regards,

Sparsh

entry.title: Re: Which changes in object(class or function) can case regenerate related code/objects
entry.content:
So, it dumps also in the DEV system, before transporting.

There's a Solution Manager tool to check a transport request before releasing it, but I don't use this tool, I don't know if it analyses dependencies in the DEV system.

There are these links about the tool:

  • How to detect transport-related errors before they... - SAP Community
  • Transport Request Check Tool - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SF Compensation - Planner Audit for Salary Notes
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec

Thank you for your feedback and for looking into it. Would be great if this could be supported in the future. In case it will not be supported, the option to tick the box for "Auditable" should better not be available.

entry.title: Re: Production Labor cost calculation in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Not sure which excel you are referring to Also clarify at what stage do you calculate cost? What is your expected cost calculation for the example in currency and hours

entry.title: Re: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 up...
entry.content: Just to answer your question about which DLLs to look for in Procmon. They are called crxf_pdf.dll and crxf_pdf_res_en.dll (last one will depend on language I presume).

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Hi Chand Basha.S,

you might want toc check SAP notes 3284686 (Stock Transfer with EWM and Quality Management) and 3264621 (Stock transfer from plant to plant creates inspection lot with origin 01).

I assume your material has active inspection type 08 in both plants. I assume inspection type 08 shall be active as well in receiving plant. is it? If not your problem would be solved if you would deactivate inspection type 08 in the receiving plant.

As next step you could check the "SAP Knowledge Base Article" in SAP note 3271931 (Inspection lot with origin 17 is created despite QM is deactivated for movement type in OMJJ) which contains hints how to suppress inspection lot creation.

Also interesting for you might by following customer influence request we are currently working on: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/320456.  

Best regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE - Key Learnings
entry.content:
umm, not sure what to say to that - I wrote the comment myself

if you don't think the comment is appropriate then please report it to the Moderators

we should all be encouraging contributions like this

have a great day

Andy.

entry.title: Re: Batch Production Date as the Basic Start Date of a Production Order in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content: Where do you maintain batch production date? Is it maintained in batch classification? What does this date represent? Like Is it a completion date with availability in stock of the batch planned to be produced and is assigned to production/ process order at the time of creation of the order?

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Hello Chand,

can you please check the delivery tab in the STO. What is the source/destination stock type and more important, what does the QA Control Key indicates?

Kind regards,

Chris

entry.title: Bug Report – Dynamic Text Boxes Not Updating on Subpages When Navigating Directly
entry.content:
We have a story with 28 pages in total—4 main pages and 24 subpages. Our design uses four date/year input controls located on the main pages to update dynamic text boxes across all pages. Each main-page input control is responsible for updating dynamic text boxes on approximately 6–7 subpages.

Issue:
When users bypass the main pages and jump directly to subpages, the dynamic text boxes fail to update. It appears that the necessary data and input control configurations are not loaded because the user did not visit the main page where the controls reside. As a result, the date data is not reflected on the subpages.

Impact:

  • User Experience: End users see outdated or missing date information on subpages.
  • Performance: Adding duplicate input controls to each subpage is not a viable solution as it degrades overall performance.

Request:
Could you please advise on a solution or workaround that ensures dynamic text boxes on subpages load correctly even when users navigate directly to them? We are looking for an approach that does not require placing input controls on every page.

Thank you for your assistance in resolving this issue.

#SAC #SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 Short Text for Issuing Storage Location no update
entry.content:
I am able to create PO successfully after calling bapi along with supplying plant in header(POHEADER-SUPPL_PLNT & POHEADERX-SUPPL_PLNT) for STO.

Thank you for your response.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: Thank you so much Rekha.

entry.title: Changing pre-delivered master data in public cloud (FS items, subitems, document types, etc.)
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Please advise on S/4HANA Public Cloud for Group Reporting.

There is a request to change descriptions of some pre-delivered master data such as FS items, subitems and document types because they are somewhat confusing.
To be more specific, our customer wants to change descriptions of the following master data:
- FS Item
- Subitem
- Breakdown Category
- Document Type
- Task
- Consolidation Method

Can they be changed as per customers' request?
Will they be overwritten by pre-delivered entries after upgrade?  

Regards,
Takashiro

entry.content: I am also facing the same issue. Please let me know if you have found the solution

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - How to create an action for uploading files
entry.content: I am also facing the same issue. Please let me know if you have found the solution

entry.title: .NET Core version of SAP Crystal Reports
entry.content:
Hi,

I have read that there are no immediate plans to release a .NET Core version of Crystal Reports.  But, is there really not a long-term plan for this over, say, a 5-10 year period?  If not, this seems to make CR a technological dead-end as far as being used with Visual Studio is concerned.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to extend Flexible Workflow to BTP SBPA on Public cloud to change the final status of PO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Currently we are trying to implement a Custom Workflow for PO using SAP Build Process Automation(SBPA) but while trying update the PO status field i.e."

PurchasingProcessingStatus" to approved or rejected in the PO API(api_purchaseorder- Version 4) it is a read only field and we are not able to use it, is there any alternative API or field to handle this?

kindly suggest if there is a way to change the status of the PO by linking the Task from Flexible workflow to SBPA. any other approach would also help.

Thank you n advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility   SAP Workflow Management, workflow capability  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: How can i download my training file fullscreen.tar fr...
entry.content:
Hi,

The prerequisites for this part of the Learning Journey are in the first lesson of the previous unit (about full-screen applications) :

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-sapui5-applications/designing-a-full-screen-application_d32759a4-f312-4539-9b52-a0999fa4fcb7

The files should be downloaded from github.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud – December 2024
entry.content:
Dear @thomashammer,

is it possible to use the "GCP Private Service Connect"-feature for a "Google BigQuery Remote Source"?

Cheers

Sven

entry.title: Re: Rev. proxy in front of Hana Express XSA
entry.content:
Hi, 

XS Advanced 1.3.0 or higher eventually supports so called "external domains". You can use this feature to setup a reverse proxy as described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCT_ID/2c1988d620e04368aa4103bf26f17727/4357904d410645ecb14611d6db0a6f38.html

If you use hostname-based routing, you can even use a different port (e.g. 443) for external requests with the option

xs create-domain <your external domain> --external --port 443

Best regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Error in Maintain PIRs when Uploading (Stuck in Loading)
entry.content:
Hi,

I face the same problem when I upload my file. But when I changed the value's format to TEXT, it fixed the issue.

So, make sure everything is in TEXT format and try again.

 BG,

entry.title: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content:
Dear experts, I met an issue when subscribing Build Apps in BTP trial using both boster or subscribing directly. All indicating the missing quota for Build Apps in the subaccount.

It's a new one and I checked that the Build Apps quota is used in nowhere but not available to subscribe.

Can anyone help with that? Thanks!

entry.title: where to add security line in Plateau Report properly?
entry.content:
Hi All,

With my simple report, I only have parameters: ReportDestinationCSV adn ReportFormatCSV.

SELECT
s.STUD_ID,
s.NOTACTIVE,
s.LNAME as LAST_NAME,
s.FNAME as FIRST_NAME,
s.DMN_ID as DOMAIN,
s.EMAIL_ADDR as EMAIL
FROM
PA_STUDENT s
LEFT JOIN
PA_INST i ON s.STUD_ID = i.INST_ID
WHERE
i.INST_ID IS NULL
/** AND [security:pa_student s] **/
/** AND [security:pa_inst i] **/

According to Using Plateau Report Designer | SAP Help Portal: "Update the Plateau comment to include the new Report Parameter. Note: Make sure the security line is the last line of the Plateau Comment."

This sql can work without problem in Preview Results in Plateau report designer and also in html, but failed when run in SAP SF LMS. Therefore, I can only suspect I did not add security line in my Plateau Report properly? Kindly share your experience, thank you!

Best, Jessica

entry.title: Re: Error in ME21N 'Data from Business Add-In ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST not adopted'
entry.content: It seems you posted the same code twice and didn't use the option to paste code in text mode (use ... and </>).

entry.title: Re: JSON Message to change field value to null via Groovy...
entry.content:
Hi @robertot4s,

I used this script instead since they have common values. 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {

    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String);
    body = body.replaceAll(/\{\s*"@nil":\s*"true"\s*\}/, 'null');
    
    message.setBody(body);
    
    // Set Content-Type
	message.setHeader("Content-Type","application/json");
	
    return message;
}

Still, Thank for your inputs, much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Handling Large Data With SAP Cloud Platform Integration OData V2 Adapter
entry.content:
@rasjoshi @nerevar you should get the index to skip by in the request -> $skip=5

You can then use skip in the query:

example of OData adapter:
http://odata.netflix.com/v2/Catalog/Titles?$top=5&$skip=1

Resource Path: Catalog
Query Options: $skip=1 (the index) 
                          $top=5 (show only top 5)

this with the following returns the titles from 1-6 in the netflix catalog

entry.title: Re: Sap fiori ListObject extensibility in fiori elements app
entry.content: Hey, thanks for the response. The problem is here that the client doesn't want to click into another detailed view and want to have all of the line items displayed at this level. So creating object page inside the line item is not the option. Another way to do that if it's even possible in fiori elements would be create mini grid table inside the object page displayed at my screenshot. The question is, is it even possible ?

entry.title: Re: getting errors user not allowed to backup encrypted d...
entry.content:
What is your ASE server version? Please get output of the followings:

select @@version
go
sp_helpdb db1
go
sp_displaylogin LOGIN_NAME
go

And please share the complete error text you received.

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE 16.0 redhat 9 raw device
entry.content: Hi William, this is not something ASE can take care of, if the OS doesn't provide the raw device module, then there is no option for ASE to be able to use it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content: Can you show us the destination details? And the service is an OData service?

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 - Controller function not call after change th...
entry.content: I've added it but still have the same problem

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: You have been added to the waiting list !

entry.title: Re: Legacy data transfer and Make company code settings -...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you can use FYV SZ and configure it as you wish. With the current FYV K4, the desired outcome is hardly possible.

However, the FYV assignment is a very early step, with no option to change it later. The selected fiscal year variant will apply to your entire system.
If your system is still on early phase (no journal entry, no org. structure) you can change the assigned variant from K4 to SZ.

Check out this HelpPortal topic: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/497a54d1c7714de69a4b1fa3012ebfdd.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Production Resource Tool Integration with PM & PP
entry.content:
I tried to use this process but it doesn't work. 

The Production Order confirmation doesn't create a measurement document.

What can be the problem? Do you have any idea?

Best regards

entry.title: Fields captured by third party content provider from LMS
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I would like to understand if below details can be tracked from SF LMS, either its SCORM or AICC file to third party content provider or what all other fields can be captured by third party content provider if we enable the SCORM or AICC wrapper content. 

i have gone thorugh https://me.sap.com/notes/2337470 but not seen details on completion date, but i have seen it gets shared from LMS.

  1. First name
  2. Last name
  3. Employee Id
  4. Completion time 
  5. Grade
  6. Completion date

Thanks,

Varsha

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @rammel_sapdev   Thanks for your query.

If I understand correctly, you're asking whether the event handler class "ycl_salesorder_event_consump" was created under a Standard ABAP package or an ABAP Cloud package. We created it under a Standard ABAP package since we worked in an On-Premise system. However, it should also be possible to create it under an ABAP Cloud package in Cloud system, though we haven't tried it yet.

For reference, the standard RAP BO R_SALESORDERTP is also developed under a Standard ABAP package in On-Premise. Additionally, based on my understanding of Extensibility, RAP is considered Clean Core, so this should also fall under the Clean Core approach.

entry.title: Re: Error in ME21N 'Data from Business Add-In ME_PROCESS_...
entry.content:
Usually these messages come from an infinite loop. I suppose the item change triggers an account update, which triggers an item update, until the program safely stops the loop.

Make sure your code does not use the set_data method when no value is actually changed (should be in the not posted process_account method as process_item already check this)

entry.title: Re: Integration to a BTP destination in SAP Build Apps is...
entry.content:
The settings for WebIDAUsage is making Build Apps think it is a catalog. Either remove that property or change to odata_gen.

Also, worth adding BuildApps.ApiType = odata.

Here's a post about the WebIDEUsage settings -- I learned something new 😸:  https://myui5.wordpress.com/sap-web-ide-part-2-connecting-to-remote-systems/

entry.title: Ressource Related Billing, in IC Supplier Invoice marign is not posted
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

 

as part of IC Resource Related Billing for cost allocations (scope item 4AN) a margin should be posted in the IC debtor as well in the IC supplier invoice.

 

The margin is properly posted in the IC debtor invoice derived from the condition type. On the receiving side in the IC supplier invoice the margin should be also derived from the condition type based on the settings in SCCUI DIGITS. In this config steps, it seems to be possible to derive a margin account based on the condition type for the receiving company.

 

However, it does not work, also for the margin the expense account is determined.

 

How to ensure that the margin on the receiver side is also posted on a separate margin account based on the condition type?

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Ressource Related Billing, in IC Supplier Invoice mar...
entry.content:
See 

“Item Surch./Disc.” option is mentioned in the "Set-up instructions" for scope item 4AN (https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/4AN?region=DE).

4AN_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

See referenced therein in configuration step Make Settings for Posting "By ticking the Item Surch./Disc, you can display the surcharge or discount in a separate line item on the AP"

See also f1 help on field 

In configuration activity Make Settings for Posting ID 500270

For receiving company code 2210 double click on same. 
see field Item surch.Disc

See F1 help on Field 
EDI: Display Surcharges/Discounts at Item Level Separately

EDI: Display Surcharges/Discounts at Item Level Separately
If you select this field, then surcharges and discounts transferred separately are displayed at item level as further invoice items. The account assignments are copied from the items for which the surcharge/discount was levied.

If you do not select this field, the surcharges/discounts of the current invoice item are added.

Note:

The field is not relevant for invoice verification.

entry.title: Re: Batch Production Date as the Basic Start Date of a Production Order in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Where do you maintain batch production date? Batch production date is maintained in the batch master record manually now because it needs to be choosen before production actually start. It is crucial for tasks like printing labels or documentation before the goods receipt (GR).

Is it maintained in batch classification? Yes, the batch production date is also maintained in the batch classification.

What does this date represent? The batch production date represents the date when the batch is produced.

Is it a completion date with availability in stock of the batch planned to be produced and is assigned to production/process order at the time of creation of the order? The batch production date is not necessarily the completion date. It is the date aligned with the basic start date of the production order and is assigned to the batch after order creation.

entry.title: Re: Consuming a released event of an unreleased RAP BO (h...
entry.content: You have to request the C1 release also for existing events, if it is not yet released by SAP and you want to consume them.

entry.title: Re: Access onpremise XSA application outside server
entry.content:
Hi,

please check out XS Advanced 1.3.0 or higher, which provides an easy way to setup a reverse proxy:

https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCT_ID/2c1988d620e04368aa4103bf26f17727/4357904d410645ecb14611d6db0a6f38.html

Best regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Multi Dimensional Reports have missing variants Post Upgrade to 2023 from 2019 of the SAP S4 systems
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am facing issue with the Variants after migration to S/4 HANA.

Multi Dimensional Reports have missing variants

Post Upgrade to 2023 from 2019 of the SAP S4 systems, the Variants in the report are missing.

 

For the reports to be compatible, we had to migrate the custom reports from existing ‘Design Studio’ template to ‘WebDynpro’ template as suggested by SAP.

 

Report in Production Env

 

Selection Screen

 

Report opens in Design Studio Template (As prod is yest to be upgraded)

 

When we go to Manage Views, the Variant is available.

 

 

WHEREAS

In the Upgraded Pre-Production Environment

For the same report in Pre-Production

 

 

If I check the Variants, only the standard variant is available

 

Did anyone faced the same issue. Please share your feedback.

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @Sabarim_07 ,

Yes, it is possible to trigger events through GUI as well as FIORI Apps.
Could you explain the steps you followed to trigger the event ?.

entry.title: Re: How can i download my training file fullscreen.tar fr...
entry.content:
The files listdetail.tar and fullscreen.tar are nowhere in https://github.com/SAP-samples/sapui5-development-advanced-learning-journey, as far as I can see.

In the commits, one can see there used to be files like "ux402_fullscreen.zip" (containing "ux402_fullscreen.tar" but they have been removed).

  • Commit file "ux402_fullscreen.zip" added: https://github.com/SAP-samples/sapui5-development-advanced-learning-journey/commit/26321aa27ecc276289b148a20f57b4fd870cf06f.
  • There are other commits adding the other files.
  • Commit all files deleted: https://github.com/SAP-samples/sapui5-development-advanced-learning-journey/commit/7fc162935e6ae65b1ca0b89099c5303900c045ff.

entry.title: Re: No direct postings can be made to G/L acct. 50000020...
entry.content:
Hello @Dasun_T 

The account is set for automatic postings only:

There is no way around this checkbox. If it is set, then you can't post manually to the G/L account. Puting the account in a purchase order account assignment counts as manual posting. 

Either you are using an incorrect account in the purchase order or the account is incorrectly set for automatic postings only.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Commitment management for CO Module
entry.content: I suggest that you first look at the commitment items on the purchase order line item. That way, at least, you'll figure out where the problem is.

entry.title: Re: Announcing the Water Track at the SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference 2025
entry.content: Indeed, you are right. It will be lectured by a colleague from Product Management team and due to the relevance you highlight it will be offered both wednesday 9th and thursday 10th to facilitate attendance. Looking forward seeing you in Rotterdam!

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Available
entry.content:
This is good to know. Unfortunately there aren't much documentation for these parameters. So if I understand this correctly set these parameter:

  • ccl/snc/namealias/value_0 = L=ako060kei.accounts.ondemand.com, OU=cf-eu10-secure-login-service, OU=SAP BTP Clients, O=SAP SE, C=DE
  • ccl/snc/namealias/replacement_0 = (empty)

It will convert SLS based SNC name

  • p:CN=GVAROGL, L=ako060kei.accounts.ondemand.com, OU=cf-eu10-secure-login-service, OU=SAP BTP Clients, O=SAP SE, C=DE
    to this:
  • p:CN=GVAROGL

right? or should I do it other way around and align the kerberos string to the SLS one?

I also have one further question. Does the user still has to manually launch the sbus.exe /gui and manually logon? or is it also possible to force the user to logon to the secure login service before falling back to kerberos?

entry.title: Workforce Person Change for JB1 (WFD_CHANGE_WFP_JB1)
entry.content:
Hello, we have implemented JB1 to transfer Employee's from SuccessFactors to S4Hana Public Cloud, at current it is working well, except it is creating user in Maintain Business User APP as well, we have been advised that you can stop this by using  Workforce Person Change for JB1 (WFD_CHANGE_WFP_JB1) and removing the UserName.

We have tired to clear the UserName and empty the UserName and still we get this error.

Unable to process workforce person record

Business partner ID not found for workforce person 0156C132-EFC3-1EDT-B692-9C1FADAF207A with username_SAPSUPPORT.

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated how to configure the BADI to stop the Business User from being created.

entry.title: Re: Lumira in BI2025
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

There will be a Lumira 2025 version compatible with SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025. Please note that only Lumira Designer will be available from version 2025 on.

Best,

Eric

entry.title: Re: How can i download my training file fullscreen.tar fr...
entry.content: Hi Sandra, thanks for alerting on this. I'll look into this and update the Github repository !

entry.title: penalty over a late contract condition in RE-FX
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

how can i calculate penalities over a late condtion for a contract in Real estate can you give me the full cycle for that 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Standard Possibility for a huge number of single...
entry.content:
Hi evaoggero.

Please take a look at SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM). It consists of different components, the perfect fit for your dedicated requirement would be the component Contract Accounting. BRIM is designed to deal with high volumes, both customers and transactional data; it is part of the S/4HANA suite (public cloud, private cloud, onPrem), is perfectly integrated with other SAP solutions but also offers many APIs to get and send data from and to other systems like WebShops, Payment Service Providers etc.

BRIM is used by many companies in the area of telecommunications, postal/parcel, digital services and subscriptions.

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: Re: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hello @dyaryura 

Thank you for the feedback.

I’ve also looked into the SAML mapping.

I don't understand how user group assignments should be handled when a user belongs to multiple groups and when the groups are provisioned from Azure.

For example, the Azure group "sac_admin" and its user "pptadm". This group and this user, are provisioned to IAS.

Then, in the Custom Attribute 1 field of the user "pptadm," there is no attribute (e.g., "sac_admin").

How should this be automated?

Because, as I understand it, the SAML mapping works based on custom attributes in IAS. And one more question: What if a user in Azure belongs to multiple groups? Should IAS then show, for example, Custom Attribute 1 = group1 and Custom Attribute 2 = group2

Many Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Which changes in object(class or function) can case regenerate related code/objects
entry.content:
In my humble opinion, when a developer changes the signature of such an object, they MUST do a where-use-case search and, if necessary, adapt the programs that use the module or method. And transport them with the modified object.

  • Also some tests in development  should have raised the error, what's your company IT acceptance strategy?
  • Of course, you could just add optional parameters, but that doesn't always make sense...

entry.title: Re: Legacy data transfer and Make company code settings -...
entry.content: Hi, thank you Norbert! We are already in testing phase so we cannot change the K4. Anyway, even if this could be the solution for the first go-live I don´t think that the change needs to be done this drastic. What if our client acquires another company code with again another fiscal period different from our client´s, how should we prepare for that asset transfer from legacy?

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Manager link to URL
entry.content:
Good day NuG25,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community!  It is recommended that you 

create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password). 
You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component as shared in the example below:
 
System: 
Search for SAP Signavio  
 
Product Area: 
SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager 
 
Component: 
BPI (Business Process Intelligence) 
---  
BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or 
BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Product & Topic 
 
If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 
 
Kind regards,
 
KantriceD

entry.title: Re: How to stop messages in CPI manually
entry.content:
@DCG @luis_gomez  your errors happen if you are missing the "&iFlowId=<yourIflow ID here>" in your URL. Unfortunatly the example URL up top isnt complete. 
Here is another example:

https://12345-iflmap.hcisbp.eu1.hana.ondemand.com/http/CancelMessage?messageId=AGerS28XtdP9VtkdOPLov10nE6fQ&iFlowId=Stop_Stuck_Messages

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: can't easily tell what went wrong
